TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Selsl sakasipina' no fafaina a malafainayan. Singangan a ma'min ko masaselalay, I tini i 'Amis tangasa i nikalasawad no selal ko kasingangan to ngangan no selal. No timolan a pinacadan, Ifelacay tangsa i mama no kappa, oroma ko ngangan, macakat to malakomong masomad ko ngangan no selal. O fainayen a wawa no pangcah, paka safaw to loto ko mih'ecaan,papiselalen to no loma', parengrengen no tapang no niyaro' ko falohay a selal.maherek a marengreng ko fafainay,O solinayayto a malakapah no niyaro'. Anini i 2011 a mihecaan, sato'asay a selal O Alafangas, Ta o Aladiwas, to Alamay, to Raraw, to Alemet, to Maoway,to Maolac, to Maorad, to Matafok.makomod sasiwa a saselalan ko nikasaselaselal.Nika;malasawad ko cacay a saselalan sisa wawalo to ko selal no niyaro anini.
S.PHON: s…ô…ĺs…ĺ sakasipina ° no~u fafaina a ma…ĺafainajan. siŇčaŇčan a ma °min ko~u masas…ô…ĺa…ĺaj, i tini i °amis taŇčasa i nika…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ no~u s…ô…ĺa…ĺ ko~u kasiŇčaŇčan to~u ŇčaŇčan no~u s…ô…ĺa…ĺ. no~u timo~u…ĺan a pina ¶a…¨~…ģan, if…ô…ĺa ¶aj taŇčsa i mama no~u kappa, o~uro~uma ko~u ŇčaŇčan, ma ¶akat to~u ma…ĺako~umo~uŇč maso~uma…¨~…ģ ko~u ŇčaŇčan no~u s…ô…ĺa…ĺ. o~u fainaj…ôn a wawa no~u paŇč ¶ańß, paka safaw to~u …ĺo~uto~u ko~u mińß °…ô ¶aan,papis…ô…ĺa…ĺ…ôn to~u no~u …ĺo~uma °, par…ôŇčr…ôŇč…ôn no~u tapaŇč no~u nijaro~u ° ko~u fa…ĺo~uńßaj a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ.mańß…ôr…ôk a mar…ôŇčr…ôŇč ko~u fafainaj,o~u so~u…ĺinajajto~u a ma…ĺakapańß no~u nijaro~u °. anini i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan, sato~u °asaj a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ o~u a…ĺafaŇčas, ta o~u a…ĺa…¨~…ģiwas, to~u a…ĺamaj, to~u raraw, to~u a…ĺ…ôm…ôt, to~u mao~uwaj,to~u mao~u…ĺa ¶, to~u mao~ura…¨~…ģ, to~u matafo~uk.mako~umo~u…¨~…ģ sasiwa a sas…ô…ĺa…ĺan ko~u nikasas…ô…ĺas…ô…ĺa…ĺ.nika;ma…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ ko~u ¶a ¶aj a sas…ô…ĺa…ĺan sisa wawa…ĺo~u to~u ko~u s…ô…ĺa…ĺ no~u nijaro~u anini.
S.FORM: Selsl sakasipina' no fafaina a malafainayan. Singangan a ma'min ko masaselalay, I tini i 'Amis tangasa i nikalasawad no selal ko kasingangan to ngangan no selal. No timolan a pinacadan, Ifelacay tangsa i mama no kappa, oroma ko ngangan, macakat to malakomong masomad ko ngangan no selal. O fainayen a wawa no pangcah, paka safaw to loto ko mih'ecaan,papiselalen to no loma', parengrengen no tapang no niyaro' ko falohay a selal.maherek a marengreng ko fafainay,O solinayayto a malakapah no niyaro'. Anini i 2011 a mihecaan, sato'asay a selal O Alafangas, Ta o Aladiwas, to Alamay, to Raraw, to Alemet, to Maoway,to Maolac, to Maorad, to Matafok.makomod sasiwa a saselalan ko nikasaselaselal.Nika;malasawad ko cacay a saselalan sisa wawalo to ko selal no niyaro anini.
S.PHON: s…ô…ĺs…ĺ sakasipina ° no~u fafaina a ma…ĺafainajan. siŇčaŇčan a ma °min ko~u masas…ô…ĺa…ĺaj, i tini i °amis taŇčasa i nika…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ no~u s…ô…ĺa…ĺ ko~u kasiŇčaŇčan to~u ŇčaŇčan no~u s…ô…ĺa…ĺ. no~u timo~u…ĺan a pina ¶a…¨~…ģan, if…ô…ĺa ¶aj taŇčsa i mama no~u kappa, o~uro~uma ko~u ŇčaŇčan, ma ¶akat to~u ma…ĺako~umo~uŇč maso~uma…¨~…ģ ko~u ŇčaŇčan no~u s…ô…ĺa…ĺ. o~u fainaj…ôn a wawa no~u paŇč ¶ańß, paka safaw to~u …ĺo~uto~u ko~u mińß °…ô ¶aan,papis…ô…ĺa…ĺ…ôn to~u no~u …ĺo~uma °, par…ôŇčr…ôŇč…ôn no~u tapaŇč no~u nijaro~u ° ko~u fa…ĺo~uńßaj a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ.mańß…ôr…ôk a mar…ôŇčr…ôŇč ko~u fafainaj,o~u so~u…ĺinajajto~u a ma…ĺakapańß no~u nijaro~u °. anini i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan, sato~u °asaj a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ o~u a…ĺafaŇčas, ta o~u a…ĺa…¨~…ģiwas, to~u a…ĺamaj, to~u raraw, to~u a…ĺ…ôm…ôt, to~u mao~uwaj,to~u mao~u…ĺa ¶, to~u mao~ura…¨~…ģ, to~u matafo~uk.mako~umo~u…¨~…ģ sasiwa a sas…ô…ĺa…ĺan ko~u nikasas…ô…ĺas…ô…ĺa…ĺ.nika;ma…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ ko~u ¶a ¶aj a sas…ô…ĺa…ĺan sisa wawa…ĺo~u to~u ko~u s…ô…ĺa…ĺ no~u nijaro~u anini.
